allow: Bash(python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\('paralla_decoder.ipynb'\)\); print\(json.dumps\([{'id': c['id'], 'src_preview': ''.join\(c['source']\)[:80]} for c in nb['cells']], indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\('paralla_decoder.ipynb', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\(json.dumps\([{'id': c['id'], 'src_preview': ''.join\(c['source']\)[:80]} for c in nb['cells']], indent=2\)\)")
